{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-50290", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "## Finding

**Location**: `core/src/server/render-to-string.ts:307-311`

CSS value sanitization stripped `expression(` and `url(javascript:` using simple regex, but could be bypassed with CSS unicode escapes (`\65xpression(`), null bytes, or CSS comments (`exp/**/ression(`).

**Mitigating Factor**: These CSS injection vectors only work in legacy browsers (IE6-IE10). SpecifyJS targets modern browsers.

## Status

**Fixed in v0.2.136** — CSS sanitization now normalizes unicode escapes and strips CSS comments before pattern matching. Also checks for `behavior:`, `-moz-binding`, and `-o-link` patterns.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-93q6-wwjh-jc6h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T19:08:45Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-93q6-wwjh-jc6h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-93q6-wwjh-jc6h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-50290"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-02T19:08:45Z", "references": ["https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs/security/advisories/GHSA-93q6-wwjh-jc6h", "https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs/commit/25d1fb491d99479efdf501f5f75e0bb80c908f0a", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-93q6-wwjh-jc6h"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs/security-advisories/GHSA-93q6-wwjh-jc6h", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/specifyjs", "summary": "@asymmetric-effort/specifyjs: CSS expression sanitization is bypassable in renderToString", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T19:08:46Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-93q6-wwjh-jc6h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.2.136", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@asymmetric-effort/specifyjs"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.2.136"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: @asymmetric-effort/specifyjs: CSS expression sanitization is bypassable in renderToString
